name: shoplink-api
description: API ShopLink — auth, sites, produits, paiements, admin

scripts.dev:win: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; node index.js"
